name: Cosmic Storm
text: Field: At the beginning of each turn, all players roll a die. The player with the lowest die result must inflict 5 HP damage to their primary creature.

condition.text: At the beginning of each turn, all players roll 1D6; lowest result loses

effects.actionText: All players roll; lowest damages primary creature
effects.value: Lowest die result takes 5 HP damage to primary creature

duration.text: Each turn while field effect is active

params.valueText: Lowest die result takes 5 HP damage to primary creature
